return(function(...)local Z={"\109\121\057\055","\070\109\118\080\090\103\119\079\057\052\118\053\083\072\057\112\101\110\061\061","\065\090\110\053\100\079\098\113\065\072\111\057\070\074\097\076\113\082\082\061","\048\074\117\073\068\122\121\107";"\075\077\067\061","\084\103\115\114\080\077\099\043";"\081\078\057\086\111\077\101\061";"\101\114\097\085\113\077\051\065\090\052\081\113\081\049\097\098","\081\079\074\055\081\113\061\061";"\054\050\079\065\071\113\061\061","\056\048\115\113\057\106\076\048","\101\078\074\114\075\079\074\112\081\113\061\061","\083\049\111\112\073\081\119\110\105\113\061\061","\049\052\075\047";"\100\077\074\069\075\107\061\061";"\111\057\083\072\100\052\098\112\080\069\057\076\065\082\057\102\081\049\082\061";"\113\114\081\109\065\066\073\073\081\069\073\108\100\109\073\073\113\087\061\061";"";"\111\077\053\087\080\077\070\116";"\113\084\114\099\115\087\061\061","\090\119\105\112\080\103\108\061","\082\108\099\076\070\111\086\105\051\099\122\082\115\081\053\081","\099\055\050\072\121\069\119\106\079\104\119\089\118\122\055\115\073\122\090\100\073\107\067\105\083\085\054\084\116\097\088\116\089\074\065\076\051\051\112\101\052\080\111\072\112\081\052\115\043\087\069\100\075\077\086\084\053\078\066\043\104\068\052\116\113\120\056\104","\090\109\070\047\081\057\074\085\057\049\081\069\121\105\099\120\081\087\061\061","\082\057\112\105\076\051\080\061";"\052\100\084\120\047\106\110\082\109\110\061\061","\118\043\050\080\110\073\108\082";"\049\082\085\117\086\081\070\115\118\110\061\061","\109\069\118\052\065\114\110\079\100\090\073\070\080\090\113\085","\089\069\101\061";"\077\074\111\086\065\114\082\085\097\105\111\120\113\066\070\079","\080\074\048\053\101\053\109\066";"\065\103\097\069\101\105\111\098\111\107\061\061","\080\048\118\049\070\090\081\079\109\114\070\098\100\109\070\052\090\087\061\061";"\097\056\089\120\114\078\086\076\076\056\121\109\048\081\056\061";"\070\048\081\076\090\114\101\049\097\072\119\102\075\078\099\082\075\078\105\061";"\089\072\051\043 return(function(Z,V,B,G,s,n,c,W,t,C,d,A,q,u,a,g,U,K,j,M,m,Q,F,v,S)F,q,W,t,A,K,C,M,U,v,g,u,j,S,m,d,a,Q=function(Z,D)local V=g(D)local B=function(B)return C(Z,{B},D,V)end return B end,function(Z)local D,C=344575-344574,Z[-446562-(-446563)]while C do W[C],D=W[C]-(913219-(((737682+-1700983)+846978)+(967024-(-62517)))),(325455-325454)+D if W[C]==412876-412876 then W[C],K[C]=nil,nil end C=Z[D]end end,{},function(Z,D)local V=g(D)local B=function(B,G,s,n)return C(Z,{B,G;s,n},D,V)end return B end,function(Z,D)local V=g(D)local B=function(B,G)return C(Z,{B,G},D,V)end return B end,{},function(C,B,G,s)local qQ,HQ,dQ,WQ,DQ,h,uQ,E,BQ,yQ,FQ,I,vQ,tQ,g,i,y,Y,o,H,J,SQ,jQ,NQ,sQ,l,hQ,xQ,N,CQ,w,z,M,p,X,R,q,YQ,r,GQ,IQ,kQ,zQ,c,UQ,AQ,T,EQ,pQ,ZQ,VQ,cQ,f,W,P,MQ,x,TQ,e,bQ,aQ,O,fQ,wQ,L,gQ,mQ,KQ,QQ,b,nQ,k while C do if
